Dear [Recipient Name],

Thank you for reaching out and inviting me to [Meeting Topic/Purpose]. I appreciate you thinking of me.

Unfortunately, due to a prior scheduling conflict, I will be unable to attend the meeting on [Original Date/Time]. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

I am keen to stay informed on [Meeting Topic/Purpose] and would be grateful if you could share any relevant notes or materials. Please let me know if there's an alternative time or date that might work, or if there's another way I can contribute.

Thank you for your understanding.
